sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85331" key="poluskw/mmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-σκώμμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of mocking,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:171" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.171</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
